name: MLH1 300kb TAD (ENCODE K562 CTCF + H3K27ac)
description: 300kb window spanning the MLH1 locus on chr3p21.3. MLH1 (MutL Homolog 1) is a key DNA mismatch repair gene; germline pathogenic variants cause Lynch syndrome (HNPCC). CTCF sites from ENCODE K562 ChIP-seq (ENCFF736NYC, ENCSR000DWE, IDR narrowPeak, GRCh38). H3K27ac enhancer peaks from ENCODE K562 (ENCFF864OSZ, ENCSR000AKP, GRCh38). MLH1 and EPM2AIP1 share a bidirectional CpG island promoter; hypermethylation causes Lynch syndrome and sporadic MSI-high cancers. K562 CTCF used because CTCF binding is largely cell-type invariant (Cuddapah 2009, PMID:19030024). TAD boundaries estimated from Rao et al. 2014 K562 Arrowhead (GSE63525, hg19 lifted to hg38 with approximately -41,324bp offset).

enhancers.name: TRANK1_3prime_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak at TRANK1 3-prime end (Peak_30635, 36907805-36908808, signal=5.65). Near 5-prime window boundary. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy from signal ratio

enhancers.name: TRANK1_intron_H3K27ac_1
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak in TRANK1 intron (Peak_21725, 36912140-36913498, signal=7.58, 1.4kb wide). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: TRANK1_intron_H3K27ac_2
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak in TRANK1 intron (Peak_22813, 36923636-36925122, signal=8.07, 1.5kb wide). Co-localizes with CTCF (signal=15.59). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: TRANK1_intron_H3K27ac_3
enhancers.note: H3K27ac peak in TRANK1 intron (Peak_29489, 36941394-36942138, signal=6.49). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: Intergenic_boundary_super_enhancer
enhancers.note: Strong H3K27ac peak (Peak_6995, 36956491-36959219, signal=21.87, 2.7kb wide). Co-localizes with STRONGEST CTCF in window (signal=178.74). Located ~35kb upstream of MLH1 TSS. Active insulator/boundary element between TRANK1 and MLH1 regulatory domains. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: Intergenic_enhancer_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Strong H3K27ac peak (Peak_8353, 36968997-36971159, signal=20.46, 2.2kb wide). Located ~23kb upstream of MLH1 TSS in intergenic region between TRANK1 and EPM2AIP1. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: MLH1_EPM2AIP1_bidirectional_promoter
enhancers.note: STRONGEST H3K27ac in window (Peak_403, 36990680-36994774, signal=62.86, score=1000, 4.1kb wide). Spans EPM2AIP1/MLH1 bidirectional CpG island promoter. MLH1 TSS at 36993466 (+ strand, NM_000249.4). EPM2AIP1 ends at 36993131 (- strand). Promoters separated by ~335bp. Hypermethylation of this CpG island causes Lynch syndrome. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy — highest signal in window

enhancers.name: LRRFIP2_promoter_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Strong H3K27ac peak at LRRFIP2 promoter (Peak_5755, 37175159-37176839, signal=29.08, score=1000, 1.7kb wide). Co-localizes with CTCF (signal=48.79). Adjacent H3K27ac peak (Peak_18487, 37176963-37177578, signal=10.96). Candidate 3-prime TAD boundary element. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

ctcf_sites.name: TRANK1_intron_CTCF_1
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF in TRANK1 intron (36902726-36902996, score=795). Near 5-prime window boundary

ctcf_sites.name: TRANK1_intron_CTCF_2
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF in TRANK1 intron (36904723-36904993, score=1000). ~2kb from TRANK1_CTCF_1, potential tandem boundary pair

ctcf_sites.name: TRANK1_intron_CTCF_3
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF in TRANK1 intron (36923519-36923789, score=793). Co-localizes with H3K27ac peak (signal=8.07)

ctcf_sites.name: Intergenic_CTCF_1
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF in intergenic region between TRANK1 and EPM2AIP1 (36957110-36957380, score=1000). Part of tandem pair with strongest CTCF ~1.7kb downstream

ctcf_sites.name: Intergenic_boundary_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: STRONGEST CTCF in window (36958797-36959014, score=1000, signal=178.74). Co-localizes with strong H3K27ac (signal=21.87). Key insulator/boundary element defining upstream limit of MLH1 regulatory domain. ~34kb upstream of MLH1 TSS

ctcf_sites.name: MLH1_intron12_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF within MLH1 gene body, intron 12 (37024151-37024421, score=1000). May function as intragenic insulator or sub-domain boundary

ctcf_sites.name: LRRFIP2_promoter_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Strong CTCF at LRRFIP2 promoter (37175763-37176033, score=1000). Co-localizes with strong H3K27ac (signal=29.08). Candidate 3-prime TAD boundary element

tad_boundaries.name: MLH1_primary_TAD
tad_boundaries.note: Primary TAD containing MLH1 (~220kb). hg19: ~37000000-37220000 lifted to hg38 with -41324bp offset (APPROXIMATE — not formal liftOver, based on MLH1 NM_000249 hg19=37034841 vs hg38=36993466). Contains EPM2AIP1, MLH1, LRRFIP2. Boundaries align with strong CTCF sites at 36958900 (signal=178.74) and 37175898 (signal=48.79). Rao et al. 2014 Cell (PMID:25497547)

tad_boundaries.name: upstream_TAD
tad_boundaries.note: Upstream TAD (~200kb). hg19: ~36800000-37000000. Contains TRANK1. Boundary at CTCF tandem pair (36957245-36958900)

tad_domains.liftover_method: linear offset -41324bp (APPROXIMATE — not formal liftOver, based on MLH1 NM_000249 hg19=37034841 vs hg38=36993466)

studies.finding: MLH1 and EPM2AIP1 share a bidirectional CpG island promoter. Hypermethylation of this promoter is the most common cause of sporadic MSI-high colorectal cancer and the defining mechanism in Lynch syndrome epimutation
CTCF binding sites are largely invariant across cell types

_thresholds_note: Not calibrated for 300x300 matrix. Requires empirical calibration after first MLH1 ARCHCODE run. SSIM thresholds from HBB 30kb config will be diluted at this resolution.
